overview.short: Shri Kala Bhairava Nath Swami Temple is one of the most famous Hindu temples dedicated to lord Bhairava.
overview.description: Shri Kala Bhairava Nath Swami Temple is one of the most famous Hindu temples dedicated to lord Bhairava. It is located in the ancient village of Adegaon in Seoni district in the state of Madhya Pradesh, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shri Kala Bhairava Nath Swami Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shri Kala Bhairava Nath Swami Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shri Kala Bhairava Nath Swami Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jabalpur Airport (85 km) and the nearest railway station is Jabalpur Junction (77 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shri Kala Bhairava Nath Swami Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shri Kala Bhairava Nath Swami Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shri Kala Bhairava Nath Swami Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Shri Kala Bhairava Nath Swami Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
